issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or a board event trigger, not 'Activated'. The effect triggers when a DON!! card on field is returned to DON!! deck, which is an automatic event trigger, not an activated ability.
Condition checks if Leader 'is' Sanji, not if a card named Sanji is on board. Should use 'LeaderIsName' with value 'Sanji', not 'HasCardOnBoard'.
Missing the trigger condition for when a DON!! card is returned to DON!! deck. Current DSL lacks this core game mechanic trigger.
